meta.caveat: Market/system prices are not household tariffs. Household affordability remains the SEAI semi-annual price layer.
sources: EirGrid Smart Grid Dashboard imbalance settlement price

market_prices.label: Electricity system price
market_prices.freshness: latest settlement period visible on Smart Grid Dashboard
market_prices.source: EirGrid Smart Grid Dashboard imbalance settlement price
market_prices.detail: Latest electricity imbalance settlement price. This is a system/market signal, not a household electricity tariff.

market_prices.label: Gas balancing price
market_prices.freshness: manually entered from Gas Networks Ireland table/export
market_prices.detail: Gas Networks Ireland System Average Price / imbalance price. This is a gas-system balancing signal, not a household gas tariff. Value entered from official GNI table/export while the hidden endpoint is being wired.

stats.manual_note: Read from GNI imbalance prices table/export on 2026-05-13.
